<!-- Keep PRs small, focused, and easy to review. -->

## Problem
<!-- What is broken / missing, and why does it matter? -->

## Approach
<!-- How did you solve it? Note any design decisions or trade-offs. -->

## Validation
<!-- How did you verify it works? Commands, tests, screenshots. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass (backend)
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (backend)
- [ ] No secrets or runtime data committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
